Field.DisplayName: Case Date Log ID: Date Generate & Send Initial Case Email
Field.Name: Case_x0020_Date_x0020_Log_x0020_
Field.Title: Case Date Log ID: Date Generate & Send Initial Case Email

Field.DisplayName: Case Tracker ID Lookup:Custom Dates Log ID
Field.Name: Case_x0020_Tracker_x0020_ID_x0022

Field.DisplayName: Case Tracker ID Lookup:Case Stage and Status
Field.Name: Case_x0020_Tracker_x0020_ID_x0028

Field.DisplayName: Case Tracker ID Lookup:CFit Design Engineer
Field.Name: Case_x0020_Tracker_x0020_ID_x0029
Patient_x0020_UID
Field.Formula: =[UID_Power_Automate]

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Urgency_x0020_Weight
Field.Formula: =IF([Case Urgency]="Not Urgent",1,IF([Case Urgency]="Low",2,IF([Case Urgency]="Medium",5,IF([Case Urgency]="High",7,IF([Case Urgency]="Urgent",10,1)))))

Field.Name: Created_x0020_Weight
Field.Formula: =MIN(5,(DATEDIF([Created],TODAY(),"D"))-INT(DATEDIF([Created],TODAY(),"D")/7)*2-IF(WEEKDAY(TODAY())<WEEKDAY([Created]),2,IF(OR(WEEKDAY(TODAY())=7,WEEKDAY([Created])=1),1,0))+1)

Field.Name: Reason_x0020_for_x0020_Implant_x
Field.Formula: =IF([Reason for Implant]="Primary",10,IF([Reason for Implant]="Revision",15,IF([Reason for Implant]="Peri-Prosthetic Fracture",30,IF([Reason for Implant]="Tumour",30,10))))

Field.DisplayName: Case Sent to C-Fit Date Weight
Field.Name: Case_x0020_Sent_x0020_to_x0020_C0
Field.Formula: =MIN(15,(DATEDIF([Case Sent to C-Fit Date],TODAY(),"D"))-INT(DATEDIF([Case Sent to C-Fit Date],TODAY(),"D")/7)*2-IF(WEEKDAY(TODAY())<WEEKDAY([Case Sent to C-Fit Date]),2,IF(OR(WEEKDAY(TODAY())=7,WEEKDAY([Case Sent to C-Fit Date])=1),1,0))+1)

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Priority_x0020_Weight
Field.Formula: =[Created Weight]+[Reason for Implant Weight]+[Surgery Date Weight]+[Case Sent to C-Fit Date Weight]

Field.Name: Isalltherequiredinformationprese
Field.Title: Is all the required information present on the patient form?
Field.Description: The Sales Person will accurately complete the information on the SharPoint custom request form within 24hrs of receiving the images with a detailed concept for dealing with the defect/deformity.

Field.DisplayName: Send Initial Case Email to C-Fit
Field.Name: GenerateInitialCaseEmail
Field.Title: Generate Initial Case Email

Field.Name: HasFlightDeckbeenUpdated
Field.Title: Has FlightDeck been Updated
Field.Description: Upon receiving the C-Fit number, UK Customs will create a new Sales Order in FlightDeck using the patient-specific information.

Field.Name: CaseIntakeReviewCompleted
Field.Title: Case Intake Review Completed
Field.CustomFormatter: UK Customs to review the patient images and case intake form and assess if the images and information align and if all the required information is present to design the custom implant. UK Customs will liaise with the Sales Person if any information is outstanding or required.

Field.DisplayName: If Applicable. Discuss Concept with Surgeon
Field.Name: Concept_x0020_Received_x003f_
Field.Description: Upon receiving the concept, either as a presentation or a 3D PDF, the UK Customs team will summarize and present the device with it’s key features to the surgeon. The UK Customs team will request feedback from the surgeon.

Field.Name: Surgeon_x0020_Approved_x0020_Con
Field.Description: Upon receiving the concept, either as a presentation or a 3D PDF, the UK Customs team will summarize and present the device with it’s key features to the surgeon. The UK Customs team will request feedback from the surgeon.

Field.Name: Submit_x0020_Design_x0020_Propos
Field.Description: TBD - This will be determined after completion of the first case.

Field.Name: Reviewed_x0020_Design_x0020_Prop
Field.Description: UK Customs will review the design proposal to ensure that the design aligns with the specific treatment needs of the patient and meets the surgeon's requests and preferences.

Field.Name: Design_x0020_Proposal_x0020_Appr
Field.Description: If the surgeon approves the proposal, UK Customs will document the surgeon's approval by selecting 'Yes' under 'Design Proposal Approved'.

Field.Name: Design_x0020_Proposal_x0020_Reje
Field.Description: If the surgeon rejects the proposal, UK Customs will document the rejection by selecting 'Yes' under 'Design Proposal Rejected' and will record the surgeon's feedback in the 'Approval Process Comment:' section. This feedback is vital for the design team to incorporate the surgeon's input into the necessary design adjustments.

Field.Name: Request_x0020_Quotation
Field.Description: Upon reaching a consensus that a specific version of the proposal will likely be the final one, UK Customs will request a quotation for the patient's custom implants and PSI guides. The request will be emailed to Maren and Carmen and will include Marieke (icDE) and Helen (icUK) in the CC

Field.DisplayName: Request a Purchase Order from the Hospital
Field.Name: Communicated_x0020_Quotation_x00
Field.Description: The Sales Person will secure a Purchase Order from the procurement department of the specific hospital.

Field.Name: PO_x0020_Received_x003f_
Field.Description: The Sales Person will forward the Purchase Order to Operations order@implantcast.co.uk and cc custom@implantcast.co.uk.

Field.DisplayName: Notification to trigger manufacturing sent to C-Fit
Field.Name: Submit_x0020_Manufacturing_x0020
Field.Description: Upon receiving the Purchase Order, UK Customs will send the signed prescription form and notify C-Fit that manufacturing can commence. UK Customs will request the Surgical Technique.

Field.Name: Design_x0020_Proposal_x0020_Sent
Field.Description: After reviewing the design proposal, the UK Customs team will summarize and present the device, highlighting its key features, to the surgeon. The team will then seek the surgeon's approval and feedback on the proposal.

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Planning_x0020_Approa
Field.Description: Sales Person to select Intake Form or I-Caps planning approach.

Field.Name: Surgeon_x0020_Rejected_x0020_Con
Field.Description: If the surgeon rejects the concept, UK Customs will record the surgeon's feedback in the 'Planning / Concept Comment:' section. This feedback is crucial for the design team to integrate the surgeon's input into the final design modifications.

Field.Name: I_x002d_CapsCaseCreated_x002e_
Field.Title: I-Caps Case Created.
Field.Description: If Applicable. UK Custom to create an I-Caps Case.

Field.Name: RequestImagesformPAC_x2019_sDepa
Field.Title: Request Images form PAC’s Department.
Field.Description: Request a copy of the images from the PACs department and ask that the images be sent to the custom@implantcast.co.uk mailbox and the OTP (One Time Pin) be sent to the k.brouwer@implantcast.co.uk mailbox.

Field.Name: Quotationisavailableinpatientfol
Field.Title: Quotation is available in patient folder.
Field.Description: Upon receiving the implant pricing, Operations will create an official implant quotation and forward it to the designated salesperson for the specific case, CC the engineer into the communication.

Field.DisplayName: Follow up with PAC’s Department on
Field.Name: Follow_x0020_up_x0020_with_x0020

Field.Description: When a new custom is requested the Sales Person will create a new case on the UK Customs Case Tracker.
Field.Name: CreatenewCustomCase
Field.Title: Create new Custom Case

Field.DisplayName: Shipping date from Germany to UK for custom components
Field.Description: Upon triggering manufacturing, Design Engineer to advise of delivery date.
Field.Name: Advise_x0020_of_x0020_delivery

Field.Description: Customs OC will arrive to icUK along with any loan kits booked to support case see WI002/ WI017. W&L Team will arrange delivery to the hospital ensuring surgical techniques, delivery notes, washing instructions and decontamination notes are enclosed. Upon receipt of the custom made items, the Sales Person must check the items prior to the operation. Any missing items or mistakes can then be rectified in time for the operation.
Field.DisplayName: Custom components delivered to the UK
Field.Name: Shipping0
Field.Title: Shipping

Field.Description: After surgery, usage to be sent via email to icUK from Sales Person and is processed by CS Manager as per WI048. Any loaned items will be returned as per WI003. Sales Person to send any feedback by email to C-fit regarding the case.
Field.Name: RecordUsage
Field.Title: Record Usage

Field.Description: Sales Person to advise Surgeon of surgery date.
Field.Name: Advise_x0020_surgery_x0020_date
Patient_x0020_UID
Field.Formula: =[UID_Power_Automate]

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Intake_x0020_Status
Field.Formula: =IF([Images saved in Patient Folder]=FALSE,"Download and save images in patient folder",IF([Case Intake Form Completed]=FALSE,"Complete Case Intake Form",IF([Submit Patient Form For Review]=FALSE,"Submit Patient Form For Review",IF([Case Intake Review Completed]=FALSE,"Complete Case Intake Review",IF([Send Initial Case Email to C-Fit]=FALSE,"Send Initial Email To C-Fit"," Complete ")))))

Field.Name: Planning_x0020__x002f__x0020_Con
Field.Formula: =IF(ISBLANK([C-Fit Number])," Awaiting C-Fit Number ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Segmentation Engineer]=TRUE,[Assign Design Engineer]=TRUE)," Complete ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Segmentation Engineer]=FALSE)," To be picked up by Segmentation Engineer",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Design Engineer]=FALSE)," To be picked up by Design Engineer ",IF([Implant Design Sent to C-Fit for review]=TRUE," Complete ",IF([Planning Can Continue]=FALSE,"Information Outstanding",IF([Assign Segmentation Engineer]=FALSE," To be picked up by Segmentation Engineer",IF([Segmentation sent to customer]=FALSE,"Segmentation to be sent to customer",IF([Assign Design Engineer]=FALSE," To be picked up by Design Engineer",IF([Concept sent to customer]=FALSE,"Awaiting Concept",IF([Surgeon Approved Concept]=FALSE,"Awaiting Feedback",IF([Surgeon Approved Concept]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete "))))))))))))

Field.Name: Design_x0020_Process
Field.Formula: =IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Design Proposal sent to C-Fit to Review]=FALSE)," Awaiting Standard Plan",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Design proposal sent to customer]=FALSE)," Awaiting Review of Standard Plan ",IF([Implant Design Sent to C-Fit for review]=FALSE," Awaiting Design",IF([Design Proposal sent to C-Fit to Review]=FALSE," Awaiting review of Design",IF([Design proposal sent to customer]=FALSE," Awaiting review of Design Proposal ",IF([Design Proposal Approved]=FALSE," Awaiting Surgeon feedback ",IF([Design Proposal Approved]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete ")))))))

Field.DisplayName: PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Stage
Field.Name: Approval_x0020_Process
Field.Formula: =IF([Prescription form sent to Sales Person]=FALSE," Send Prescription form to Sales Person ",IF([Quote Sent to Sales Person]=FALSE," Send Quotation to Sales Person ",IF([PO Received]=FALSE," Awaiting PO ",IF(ISBLANK([Purchase Order Number])," Record PO Number ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",NOT(ISBLANK([Purchase Order Number])))," Complete ",IF([Signed Prescription Form Received]=FALSE," Sign Prescription Form ",IF([Notification to trigger manufacturing sent to C-Fit]=FALSE," Trigger Manufacturing ",IF([PSI Designs sent to C-Fit for Review]=FALSE," PSI Design ",IF([Surgical Technique Sent to C-Fit for review]=FALSE," Surgical Technique ",IF([Surgical Technique sent to Sales Rep]=FALSE," Awaiting Surgical Technique Review ",IF([Surgical Technique Approved]=FALSE," Awaiting Surgeon Feedback",IF([Surgical Technique Approved]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete "))))))))))))

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Stage_x0020_and_x0020
Field.Formula: =[Case Stage:]&" - "&[Case Status]

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Reference_x0020_Numbe
Field.Formula: =[C-Fit Number]&"/"&[Hospital Number: (MRN)]

Field.Name: Request_x0020_Images_x0020_State
Field.Formula: =IF([Images saved in Patient Folder]=TRUE,"Complete",IF(([Request Images Date]+7)=TODAY(),"Due",IF(([Request Images Date]+7)<TODAY(),"Overdue","In Progress")))

Field.Name: Delivery
Field.Formula: =IF([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning"," Case Complete ",IF(ISBLANK([Shipping date from Germany to UK for custom components])," Complete Delivery Date ",IF(ISBLANK([Surgery Date])," Record Surgery Date ",IF([Approve OC]=FALSE," Awaiting OC ",IF([Custom components delivered to the UK]=FALSE," Delivery From Germany ",IF(ISBLANK([Shipping date, from UK to account for custom components])=TRUE," Delivery to Account "," Case Complete "))))))

Field.Name: Surgery
Field.Formula: =" Case Complete "

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Intake_x0020_Status0
Field.Formula: =IF([Images saved in Patient Folder]=FALSE," Case Intake ",IF([Case Intake Form Completed]=FALSE," Case Intake ",IF([Submit Patient Form For Review]=FALSE," Case Intake ",IF([Case Intake Review Completed]=FALSE," Case Intake ",IF([Send Initial Case Email to C-Fit]=FALSE," Case Intake ",IF([Send Initial Case Email to C-Fit]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete "))))))

Field.Name: Planning_x0020__x002f__x0020_Con0
Field.Formula: =IF(ISBLANK([C-Fit Number])," Planning / Concept ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Segmentation Engineer]=TRUE,[Assign Design Engineer]=TRUE)," Complete ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Segmentation Engineer]=FALSE)," Planning / Concept ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Design Engineer]=FALSE)," Planning / Concept ",IF([Implant Design Sent to C-Fit for review]=TRUE," Complete ",IF([Planning Can Continue]=FALSE," Planning / Concept ",IF([Assign Segmentation Engineer]=FALSE," Planning / Concept ",IF([Segmentation sent to customer]=FALSE," Planning / Concept ",IF([Assign Design Engineer]=FALSE," Planning / Concept ",IF([Concept sent to customer]=FALSE," Planning / Concept ",IF([Surgeon Approved Concept]=FALSE," Planning / Concept ",IF([Surgeon Approved Concept]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete "))))))))))))

Field.Name: Design_x0020_Process_x0020_Statu
Field.Formula: =IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Design Proposal sent to C-Fit to Review]=FALSE)," Design Proposal Generation ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Design proposal sent to customer]=FALSE)," Design Proposal Generation ",IF([Implant Design Sent to C-Fit for review]=FALSE," Design Proposal Generation ",IF([Design proposal sent to customer]=FALSE," Design Proposal Generation ",IF([Design Proposal Approved]=FALSE," Design Proposal Generation ",IF([Design Proposal Approved]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete "))))))

Field.DisplayName: PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Status
Field.Name: Financial_x0020_Approval_x0020_S
Field.Formula: =IF([Prescription form sent to Sales Person]=FALSE," Design Proposal Generation ",IF([Quote Sent to Sales Person]=FALSE," Design Proposal Generation ",IF([PO Received]=FALSE," Approval & PSI and Surgical Technique Generation ",IF(ISBLANK([Purchase Order Number])," Approval & PSI and Surgical Technique Generation ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",NOT(ISBLANK([Purchase Order Number])))," Complete ",IF([Signed Prescription Form Received]=FALSE," Approval & PSI and Surgical Technique Generation ",IF([Notification to trigger manufacturing sent to C-Fit]=FALSE," Trigger Manufacturing ",IF([Surgical Technique Approved]=FALSE," Approval & PSI and Surgical Technique Generation ",IF([Surgical Technique Approved]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete ")))))))))

Field.Name: Delivery_x0020_Status
Field.Formula: =IF([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning"," Case Complete ",IF(ISBLANK([Shipping date from Germany to UK for custom components])," Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing ",IF(ISBLANK([Surgery Date])=TRUE," Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing ",IF([Approve OC]=FALSE," Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing ",IF([Custom components delivered to the UK]=FALSE," Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing ",IF(ISBLANK([Shipping date, from UK to account for custom components])=TRUE," Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing "," Case Complete "))))))

Field.Name: Surgery_x0020_Status
Field.Formula: =" Case Complete "

Field.Name: Current_x0020_Step
Field.Formula: =IF([Case Intake Stage]<>" Complete ",[Case Intake Stage],IF([Planning / Concept Stage]<>" Complete ",[Planning / Concept Stage],IF([Design Proposal Generation Stage]<>" Complete ",[Design Proposal Generation Stage],IF([PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Stage]<>" Complete ",[PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Stage],IF([Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing Stage]<>" Complete ",[Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing Stage],IF([Surgery]<>" Case Complete ",[Surgery]," Case Complete "))))))

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Intake_x0020_Task_x00
Field.Formula: =IF([Images saved in Patient Folder]=FALSE,"Custom Case Coordinator",IF([Case Intake Form Completed]=FALSE,"Sales Person",IF([Submit Patient Form For Review]=FALSE,"Sales Person",IF([Case Intake Review Completed]=FALSE,"UK Customs Team",IF([Send Initial Case Email to C-Fit]=FALSE,"UK Customs Team"," Complete ")))))

Field.Name: Planning_x0020__x002f__x0020_Con1
Field.Formula: =IF(ISBLANK([C-Fit Number]),"C-Fit",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Segmentation Engineer]=TRUE,[Assign Design Engineer]=TRUE)," Complete ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Segmentation Engineer]=FALSE),"Imaging Specialist",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Assign Design Engineer]=FALSE),"Design Engineer",IF([Implant Design Sent to C-Fit for review]=TRUE," Complete ",IF([Planning Can Continue]=FALSE,"Custom Case Coordinator",IF([Assign Segmentation Engineer]=FALSE,"Imaging Specialist",IF([Segmentation sent to customer]=FALSE,"Imaging Specialist",IF([Assign Design Engineer]=FALSE,"Design Engineer",IF([Concept sent to customer]=FALSE,"Design Engineer",IF([Surgeon Approved Concept]=FALSE,"Sales Person",IF([Surgeon Approved Concept]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete "))))))))))))

Field.Name: Design_x0020_Process_x0020_Task_
Field.Formula: =IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Design Proposal sent to C-Fit to Review]=FALSE)," Design Engineer",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",[Design proposal sent to customer]=FALSE)," C-Fit ",IF([Implant Design Sent to C-Fit for review]=FALSE," Design Engineer ",IF([Design Proposal sent to C-Fit to Review]=FALSE," C-Fit ",IF([Design proposal sent to customer]=FALSE," C-Fit ",IF([Design Proposal Approved]=FALSE," Sales Person ",IF([Design Proposal Approved]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete ")))))))

Field.DisplayName: PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Task Owner
Field.Name: Financial_x0020_Approval_x0020_T
Field.Formula: =IF([Prescription form sent to Sales Person]=FALSE," Design Engineer ",IF([Quote Sent to Sales Person]=FALSE," Custom Case Coordinator ",IF([PO Received]=FALSE," Sales Person ",IF(ISBLANK([Purchase Order Number])," Sales Person ",IF(AND([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning",NOT(ISBLANK([Purchase Order Number])))," Complete ",IF([Signed Prescription Form Received]=FALSE," Surgeon ",IF([Notification to trigger manufacturing sent to C-Fit]=FALSE," Custom Case Coordinator ",IF([PSI Designs sent to C-Fit for Review]=FALSE," Design Engineer ",IF([Surgical Technique Sent to C-Fit for review]=FALSE," Design Engineer ",IF([Surgical Technique sent to Sales Rep]=FALSE," C-Fit ",IF([Surgical Technique Approved]=FALSE," Sales Person ",IF([Surgical Technique Approved]=TRUE," Complete "," Complete "))))))))))))

Field.DisplayName: Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing Task Owner
Field.Name: Delivery_x0020_Task_x0020_Owner
Field.Formula: =IF([Request Type:]="Standard Implant Planning"," Case Complete ",IF(ISBLANK([Shipping date from Germany to UK for custom components])," Custom Case Coordinator ",IF(ISBLANK([Surgery Date])," Sales Person ",IF([Approve OC]=FALSE," C-Fit ",IF([Custom components delivered to the UK]=FALSE," Custom Case Coordinator ",IF(ISBLANK([Shipping date, from UK to account for custom components])=TRUE," Custom Case Coordinator "," Case Complete "))))))

Field.Name: Surgery_x0020_Task_x0020_Owner
Field.Formula: =" Case Complete "

Field.Name: Whose_x0020_court_x0020_is_x00200
Field.Formula: =IF([Case Intake Task Owner]<>" Complete ",[Case Intake Task Owner],IF([Planning / Concept Task Owner]<>" Complete ",[Planning / Concept Task Owner],IF([Design Proposal Generation Task Owner]<>" Complete ",[Design Proposal Generation Task Owner],IF([PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Task Owner]<>" Complete ",[PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Task Owner],IF([Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing Task Owner]<>" Complete ",[Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing Task Owner],IF([Surgery Task Owner]<>" Case Complete ",[Surgery Task Owner]," Case Complete "))))))

Field.Name: Case_x0020_Stage
Field.Formula: =IF([Case Intake Status]<>" Complete ",[Case Intake Status],IF([Planning / Concept Status]<>" Complete ",[Planning / Concept Status],IF([Design Proposal Generation Status]<>" Complete ",[Design Proposal Generation Status],IF([PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Status]<>" Complete ",[PSI Design, Surgical Technique Generation, and Approval Status],IF([Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing Status]<>" Complete ",[Custom Procurement/ Outsourced Manufacturing Status],IF([Surgery Status]<>" Case Complete ",[Surgery Status]," Case Complete "))))))

Field.Formula: =IF(NOT(ISBLANK([Shipping date, from UK to account for custom components])),30,IF([Custom components delivered to the UK]=TRUE,29,IF([Approve OC]=TRUE,28,IF(NOT(ISBLANK([Surgery Date])),27,IF(NOT(ISBLANK([Shipping date from Germany to UK for custom components])),26,IF([Surgical Technique Approved]=TRUE,25,IF([Surgical Technique sent to Sales Rep]=TRUE,24,IF([Surgical Technique Sent to C-Fit for review]=TRUE,23,IF([PSI Designs sent to C-Fit for Review]=TRUE,22,IF([Notification to trigger manufacturing sent to C-Fit]=TRUE,21,IF([Signed Prescription Form Received]=TRUE,20,IF(NOT(ISBLANK([Purchase Order Number])),19,IF([PO Received]=TRUE,18,999)))))))))))))
